objective: Start implementing the standalone context orchestrator and deliver the first working MCP vertical slice.

edits.change: Added implementation plan for the standalone orchestrator v1 slice.
Created standalone TypeScript MCP project with MCP SDK, Qdrant client, and zod.
Added config loader for data dir, SQLite path, artifacts dir, Qdrant URL, and skill roots.
Defined task, artifact, search hit, and context pack types.
Implemented SQLite metadata store using node:sqlite.
Implemented deterministic classification, doc search, memory search, and skill lookup with integration to the existing local skill_router.py fallback.
Implemented deterministic v1 planner/reviewer artifact generation.
Added Qdrant adapter and health check.
Implemented MCP gateway with prepare_task_context, plan_or_review, search_memory, search_docs, search_skills, get_context_artifact, list_recent_artifacts, and invalidate_context_cache.
Wired startup, storage, services, Qdrant health, and stdio MCP transport.

commands.result: passed startup smoke test; reported Qdrant ok=true collections=7 and stdio MCP connected

outcome: A standalone orchestrator project now exists and boots as an MCP server with persistent local artifacts, deterministic retrieval, and a first planning/review artifact flow.
remaining_gaps: Planner service is deterministic fallback only; model-backed gpt-5.4 companion integration is not yet implemented.
Qdrant is health-checked but semantic indexing and vector retrieval are not yet implemented.
No persisted cache manager yet beyond the API placeholder.
No tests yet; only build and startup smoke verification were run.
